stemHtml: What is the difference between two runways in the point from which the approach lighting system (ALS) is measured, assuming that runway 03 has a displaced threshold of 150 m and runway 21 has not?

options.a: No difference, ALS is measured from the threshold.
options.b: ALS is measured from the threshold in one runway and 150 meters before the displaced threshold in another.
options.c: ALS is measured from the displaced threshold in both runways.
options.d: ALS is measured from the end of the runway in both cases.
